_comment: Redacted template for infra/connection-strings.json (which is git-ignored). Copy to connection-strings.json and fill real credentials. Consumed by seeder/ and loadgen/ (keys: mongoVm, cosmosRu, documentDb).

mongoVmDetails.vm2PublicIp: (none — private-only VM; use Bastion/jumpbox for ops)
mongoVmDetails.indexes: default _id only on both collections (ReqId intentionally not indexed)
mongoVmDetails.connectivity: VM1->VM2 requires NSG allow 27017 from 10.2.0.0/24 + bidirectional VNet peering (see infra/network-connect.sh)
